sequenceDiagram
    participant A
    participant B
    loop Every minute
        A->>B: Ping
        B-->>A: Pong
    end
---
+---+     +---+
| A |     | B |
+-+-+     +-+-+
  |         |
 +-----------+
 ||loop Every minute
 ||.........||
 ||         ||
 || Ping    ||
 |+-------->||
 ||         ||
 || Pong    ||
 ||<........+|
 +-----------+
  |         |
